calendarFaqs.q: Does Round Rock Independent School District have a fall break in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Round Rock Independent School District has a fall break running from Nov 24, 2025 to Nov 28, 2025, a total of 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Round Rock Independent School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Round Rock Independent School District is Tuesday, August 12, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

yearNumbers.label: Short Year
yearNumbers.detail: Round Rock ISD schedules 171 instructional days using longer school days rather than the 175–180 day schedule most Texas districts follow.

yearNumbers.label: Diwali
yearNumbers.detail: Diwali is observed as a student and staff holiday — one of very few Texas districts to formally mark this Hindu holiday on the school calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday is observed as a school holiday, giving families a long Easter weekend.

events.name: Last Day of Classes / First Semester Ends
Last Day of School / Second Semester Ends

calendarNotes: Round Rock ISD begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 12, 2025. Students observe Labor Day on September 1, Fall Break from November 24–28, Winter Break from December 22 through January 2, and Spring Break from March 16–20. Students return after Winter Break following a student holiday on January 5. Good Friday is observed on April 3. The school year ends on May 21, 2026. The calendar includes 171 instructional days.
